component.name: PreloadScene
component.script:
sub init() m.visiblePoster = m.top.findNode("visiblePoster") m.preloadPoster = CreateObject("roSGNode", "Poster") m.preloadPoster.observeField("loadStatus", "onPreloadStatus") m.preloadPoster.uri = "common:/images/icon_options.png" ' Publish the final field values so the harness can read them back. m.top.visibleUri = m.visiblePoster.uri m.top.preloadUri = m.preloadPoster.uri end sub
sub onPreloadStatus() if m.preloadPoster.loadStatus = "ready" m.visiblePoster.uri = m.preloadPoster.uri m.preloadPoster.uri = "" end if end sub
